title: UAGC Master Control
description: A single normalized Master Control and its mappings out to the source frameworks. One file per control under data/controls/.

id.description: Stable Master Control id: MC-D<n>-<NN>, where D<n> is the UAGT governance domain (D1-D8).

domain.description: One of the eight UAGT regulation-stable governance domains (paper, Table 4).

objective.description: What the control is trying to achieve, in the project's own words (never source text).

principle.description: Traceability spine, upward link: the normative principle (normative-purpose layer) this control descends from.

evidence.description: Traceability spine, forward link: evidence/assurance artefacts that demonstrate this control (evidence-&-assurance layer).

mappings.description: One mapping per source-framework reference. FR1 requires all three frameworks represented.

version.description: Must match the pinned version in data/source-manifest.yaml (checked in CI).

ref.description: Clause / Annex control / Article identifier. Null only when relationship is 'none'.

label.description: Short label for the referenced item. Never the verbatim standard text.

relationship.description: Nature of correspondence between the Master Control and this reference.
